title: DakotaAC
description: The ultimate Minecraft anti-cheat solution! Protect your server with real-time detection, powerful features, and seamless gameplay integrity.
body:
**Important Announcement: Project Moved to GitHub and Open Beta Testing**

We want to inform you that the DakotaAC project has undergone an important transition! To facilitate collaborative development, transparent testing, and community involvement, we have moved the entire project to GitHub.

**What does this mean for you?**

* **Open Beta Testing:** You now have the opportunity to actively participate in shaping the future of DakotaAC through our open beta testing program. You can access the source code, report issues, and suggest improvements directly on the GitHub platform.
* **Transparency in Development:** Follow the progress in real-time, see the changes made by developers, and better understand the direction of the project.
* **Community Involvement:** GitHub offers an excellent environment for discussions, collaboration, and contributions from the community.

We invite you to visit our GitHub repository [here](https://github.com/norbertbaricz/DakotaAC). There you will find instructions on how to get involved in beta testing and how to contribute to the project.

**The Future of the Project on This Website**

We want to be transparent with you regarding DakotaAC's presence on this website (modrinth.com/plugin/dakotaac). With the move to GitHub and the opening of beta testing, it is possible that in the future we will decide to close or remove the project from this platform.

**Why this change?**

Our primary goal is to create the best anti-cheat possible, and GitHub provides us with the tools and flexibility needed to achieve this goal through direct collaboration with the community.

Thank you for your continued support, and we are excited to develop DakotaAC alongside you on GitHub! Join us for this new stage!
